name: python3-convertertools
title: python3-convertertools
summary: Tools for converting Python data types
description:
Tools for converting Python data types
This library provides tools for manipulating Python data structures
efficiently. It includes functions for deleting and popping elements in
dictionaries using sets or tuples. These tools help in avoiding repetitive
code by offering predefined methods for common operations on Python
dictionaries.
.
Note that specific types are required for maximum performance.
.
Example usage:
.
from convertertools import (del_dict_tuple, del_dict_set,
pop_dict_tuple, pop_dict_set)
.
# del_dict* raise KeyError on missing keys
del_dict_tuple(d, ("a", "b"))
del_dict_set(d, {"a", "b"})
.
# pop_dict* ignores missing keys
pop_dict_tuple(d, ("a", "b"))
pop_dict_set(d, {"a", "b"})
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-convertertools because Tools for converting Python data types.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-convertertools as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-convertertools with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-convertertools --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
